company.what_they_do: Unknown. The website contains only a default WordPress placeholder ('Hello world!') with no real content, product descriptions, or service information.
company.raw_notes: The homepage is an unconfigured, out-of-the-box WordPress installation. All visible text is boilerplate: the default 'Hello world!' post, Lorem Ipsum-style filler text ('Amet consectur adipiscing elit...'), and the standard WordPress first-post prompt. There is no company description, no services listed, no team page, no branding beyond the domain name. The site appears to have been set up very recently and not yet built out. The org name 'Natan IT Solutions' suggests an IT services or technology solutions company, but this is inferred from the name alone — not confirmed by any first-party content.

individual.name: Natan
individual.notes: First name 'Natan' is known from signup. The email address used is hr@natanitsolutions.com, which is a departmental/functional inbox (Human Resources), not a personal address. This means the recipient may be an HR staff member, an HR manager, or someone who administers the HR inbox — but their specific name, title, and role cannot be confirmed. It is also possible in a very small/early-stage company that the founder handles HR duties under this alias. No individual-level information was findable via the website or other first-party sources.
